description: Returns transaction information based on the given transaction id

parameters.name: nonce
parameters.description: Filter the query result by the nonce of the transaction. A zero nonce represents user submitted transactions while a non-zero nonce is generated by main nodes. The filter honors the last value. If not specified, all transactions with specified payer account ID and valid start timestamp match. If multiple values are provided the last value will be the only value used.

parameters.name: scheduled
parameters.description: Filter transactions by the scheduled flag. If true, return information for the scheduled transaction. If false, return information for the non-scheduled transaction. If not present, return information for all transactions matching transactionId. If multiple values are provided the last value will be the only value used.
